calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition To Amend Death Certificate
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Williams in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Ms. Williams that the matter needed to be filed in Contra Costa County because the death certificate had been issued in that county. The Court also explained what was needed in order to amend the death certificate, provided Ms. Williams with an informational hand out from the Department of Public Health and advised Ms. Williams to seek legal advise. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
